title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Evaluation Trace: Pure Contract
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp pure contract increment in a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write deterministic pure functions whose outputs and failures depend only on explicit inputs.
Choose functional, imperative, or mixed structure from change risk and evidence needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
